title: Global Conferences and UCCN Objectives
focus: Details the 43rd General Conference and the alignment of UCCN with the UN 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development.
rationale: Fallback section derived from packet-level grouping.
sectionExcerpt:
[Page 040]
The 43rd UNESCO General Conference
Venue - Samarqand
Dates - 30th Oct - 13th November
UNESCO Director-General - Khaled - El- Enany (12th DG) - succeeded Audrey Azoulay
World Cities Day - 31st Oct (every year)
Cities designated 58
Indian City designated - Lucknow
New Creative Field Added Architecture

[Page 041]
UNESCO Creative Cities Network
United Nations Educational, Scientific and Cultural Organization
UCCN Created - 2004
Objective - Placing creativity and the creative economy at the core of their urban development plans to make cities safe, resilient, inclusive and sustainable, in line with the UN 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development
evidenceBullets: UNESCO Director-General - Khaled - El- Enany (12th DG) - succeeded Audrey Azoulay
